headline: Is Skyworks (SWKS) Using Integrated Isolators To Quietly Redefine Its Edge Computing Strategy?
summary: In late April 2026, Skyworks Solutions announced the Si86Px family of digital isolators with integrated power, combining high-speed signal isolation and a compact isolated dc-dc converter to simplify board design for industrial and automotive systems operating in harsh environments. By tightly regulating isolated power and supporting fast data rates in a single package, the Si86Px line highlights Skyworks’ effort to extend its technology into space-constrained edge, factory, and vehicle...
